---
title: R/Pharma GenAI Day
subtitle: Our third genAI single day event
description: |
  Free virtual conference on the use of genAI in Pharma.
categories:
  - genAI-day
  - APAC
  - asia-pacific
author: R/Pharma
date: 2026-04-26
image: genAI.png
image-alt: "genAI Image"
---

We're excited to announce that registration for the third **R/Pharma genAI** day is open.  genAI day is a free single day event focused on examples of using generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) with an emphasis in the drug development space and clinical domain.

The virtual Single Day Event (June 16th) will be focused on various applications of genAI such as accelerating the learning of open source languages and supporting late-stage reporting tasks. The day will consist of a workshop and a series of talks.  In addition, we'll host the June [R/Pharma Hangout](/docs/hangout/upcoming){target="_blank"} at 12:00 EDT within the same event.

genAI will run in both Europe/US and Asia-Pacific friendly timezones with presenters from local regions.  Details on both programs will follow shortly (follow [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/open-source-in-pharma){target="_blank"} for up-to-date announcements).

::: {.hero-buttons}
[genAI Day Registration](https://events.zoom.us/ev/AkKYQ7Uryr8k8HeuQ7F6rkZTHJwjHlP6gxu14Z2s1LYb0kswLdDT~ApU4J3CViJWrwmjZhnw0nwGzDFCxNGoMHJAw01NbG30yNwnVwf9IJQkvOg){.btn-action-success .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" target="_blank"}
::: 

We look forward to seeing you on June 16th!

### {.citation-image}
Blog image generated by AI

###
